"D:\download\Clion\CLion 2025.2.1\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\MomentWise.dir/objects.a
D:\download\Fyne_cCompiler\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\MomentWise.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\MomentWise.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\download\Qt\Tools\mingw810_32\bin\g++.exe -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\MomentWise.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o MomentWise.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libMomentWise.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\MomentWise.dir\linkLibs.rsp
